report.name: XXXARSOA_24JAN

dataSource.name: Q_SETUP
dataSource.select:
SELECT sob.name Company_Name, sob.chart_of_accounts_id coa_id, sob.currency_code Functional_Currency, cur.precision Functional_Currency_Precision FROM gl_sets_of_books sob, fnd_currencies cur WHERE sob.set_of_books_id = :P_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID AND sob.currency_code = cur.currency_code
/* SELECT sob.name Company_Name, sob.chart_of_accounts_id coa_id, sob.currency_code Functional_Currency, cur.precision Functional_Currency_Precision FROM gl_sets_of_books sob, ar_system_parameters param, fnd_currencies cur WHERE sob.set_of_books_id = param.set_of_books_id AND sob.currency_code = cur.currency_code */

dataSource.name: Q_MAIN
dataSource.select: SELECT substrb(party.party_name, 1, 50) customer_name, cust.account_number customer_number, cust.account_number cust_no, cust.cust_account_id customer_id, custv.profile_class_id, --site.location, -- ra_customer_trx.bill_to_site_use_id site_id, ps.customer_site_use_id site_id, --nvl(SITE.location,'') Location , party.address1 address1, party.address2 address2, party.address3 address3, party.address4 address4, party.city city, decode(party.country, 'OM', 'Sultanate of Oman', party.country) country, ps.trx_number invoice_number, ps.trx_date doc_date, ps.customer_trx_id, ps.cust_trx_type_id, ra_customer_trx.purchase_order po_no, ra_customer_trx.purchase_order_date po_date, nvl(ps.invoice_currency_code, :functional_currency) currency_code1, nvl(ps.invoice_currency_code, :functional_currency) currency_code2, ps.amount_due_remaining inv_amt_orig, ps.amount_in_dispute disputed_amt, ps.dispute_date dispute_date, ps.due_date due_date, ( nvl(:p_statement_date, sysdate) - ps.due_date ) days_due, ps.class tran_type, nvl(ra_customer_trx.attribute15, rtt.description) y_ref, ps.acctd_amount_due_remaining func_amount FROM ar_payment_schedules_all ps, ra_customer_trx_all ra_customer_trx, -- HZ_CUST_SITE_USES SITE, hz_cust_accounts cust, hz_parties party, hz_customer_profiles custv, --->> commented by Manish on 10-Mar-13 --removed on 01-apr-13 due to profile class id issue ra_cust_trx_types_all rtt WHERE ps.status = 'OP' AND cust.account_number BETWEEN nvl(:p_customer_low, cust.account_number) AND nvl(:p_customer_high, cust.account_number) AND custv.profile_class_id (+) BETWEEN nvl(:p_customer_profile_low, custv.profile_class_id(+)) AND nvl(:p_customer_profile_high, custv.profile_class_id(+)) AND ps.customer_id = cust.cust_account_id (+) AND cust.party_id = party.party_id (+) AND ps.customer_trx_id = ra_customer_trx.customer_trx_id (+) AND ra_customer_trx.cust_trx_type_id = rtt.cust_trx_type_id (+) --AND ra_customer_trx.bill_to_site_use_id = SITE.site_use_id(+) AND custv.site_use_id (+) = ps.customer_site_use_id--SITE.site_use_id ------>> commented by Manish on 10-Mar-13 --AND ps.CUSTOMER_SITE_USE_ID = SITE.site_use_id(+) AND ps.org_id = nvl(:p_org_id, ps.org_id) AND ps.class NOT IN ( 'CM' ) -- and ps.due_date <= sysdate AND ps.invoice_currency_code = nvl(:p_currency_code, ps.invoice_currency_code) AND ps.amount_due_remaining != 0 --Added on 10-Aug-2010 SR 17132 AND custv.cust_account_id (+) = cust.cust_account_id ---->--->> commented by Manish on 10-Mar-13 AND ps.trx_date <= nvl(:p_statement_date, ps.trx_date) AND ps.customer_site_use_id IN ( SELECT site_use_id FROM apps.hz_cust_site_uses_all WHERE site_use_id = ps.customer_site_use_id AND status = decode(:p_include_inactive_sites, 'N', 'A', status) ) UNION ALL SELECT substrb(party.party_name, 1, 50) customer_name, cust.account_number customer_number, cust.account_number cust_no, cust.cust_account_id customer_id, custv.profile_class_id, --site.location, -- ra_customer_trx.bill_to_site_use_id site_id, ps.customer_site_use_id site_id, --nvl(SITE.location,'') Location , party.address1 address1, party.address2 address2, party.address3 address3, party.address4 address4, party.city city, decode(party.country, 'OM', 'Sultanate of Oman', party.country) country, ps.trx_number invoice_number, ps.trx_date doc_date, ps.customer_trx_id, ps.cust_trx_type_id, ra_customer_trx.purchase_order po_no, ra_customer_trx.purchase_order_date po_date, nvl(ps.invoice_currency_code, :functional_currency) currency_code1, nvl(ps.invoice_currency_code, :functional_currency) currency_code2, ps.amount_due_remaining inv_amt_orig, ps.amount_in_dispute disputed_amt, ps.dispute_date dispute_date, ps.due_date due_date, ( nvl(:p_statement_date, sysdate) - ps.due_date ) days_due, ps.class tran_type, nvl(ra_customer_trx.attribute15, rtt.description) y_ref, ps.acctd_amount_due_remaining func_amount FROM ar_payment_schedules_all ps, ra_customer_trx_all ra_customer_trx, -- HZ_CUST_SITE_USES SITE, ra_batch_sources_all rbsa, hz_cust_accounts cust, hz_parties party, hz_customer_profiles custv, --->> commented by Manish on 10-Mar-13 --removed on 01-apr-13 due to profile class id issue ra_cust_trx_types_all rtt WHERE ps.status = 'OP' AND cust.account_number BETWEEN nvl(:p_customer_low, cust.account_number) AND nvl(:p_customer_high, cust.account_number) AND custv.profile_class_id (+) BETWEEN nvl(:p_customer_profile_low, custv.profile_class_id(+)) AND nvl(:p_customer_profile_high, custv.profile_class_id(+)) AND ps.customer_id = cust.cust_account_id (+) AND cust.party_id = party.party_id (+) AND ra_customer_trx.batch_source_id = rbsa.batch_source_id (+) AND ra_customer_trx.org_id = rbsa.org_id (+) AND ps.customer_trx_id = ra_customer_trx.customer_trx_id (+) AND ra_customer_trx.cust_trx_type_id = rtt.cust_trx_type_id (+) --AND ra_customer_trx.bill_to_site_use_id = SITE.site_use_id(+) AND custv.site_use_id (+) = ps.customer_site_use_id ------>> commented by Manish on 10-Mar-13 --AND ps.CUSTOMER_SITE_USE_ID = SITE.site_use_id(+) AND ps.org_id = nvl(:p_org_id, ps.org_id) AND ps.class IN ( 'CM' ) AND nvl(ra_customer_trx.complete_flag, 'N') = 'Y' --and ra_customer_trx.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE12 ='Approved' AND rbsa.name NOT IN ( 'Adhoc Standard Import', 'Cargo - RAPID', 'PAX - RAPID', 'SPINOFF CARGO' ) AND ( ( ra_customer_trx.interface_header_attribute12 = 'Approved'--------condition added by vinoth to validate based on mentioned cut-of date AND ra_customer_trx.trx_date >= '08-Mar-2016' ) OR ( ra_customer_trx.trx_date < '08-Mar-2016' ) ) -- and ps.due_date <= sysdate AND ps.invoice_currency_code = nvl(:p_currency_code, ps.invoice_currency_code) AND ps.amount_due_remaining != 0 --Added on 10-Aug-2010 SR 17132 AND custv.cust_account_id (+) = cust.cust_account_id ---->--->> commented by Manish on 10-Mar-13 AND ps.trx_date <= nvl(:p_statement_date, ps.trx_date) AND ps.customer_site_use_id IN ( SELECT site_use_id FROM apps.hz_cust_site_uses_all WHERE site_use_id = ps.customer_site_use_id AND status = decode(:p_include_inactive_sites, 'N', 'A', status) ) UNION ALL SELECT substrb(party.party_name, 1, 50) customer_name, cust.account_number customer_number, cust.account_number cust_no, cust.cust_account_id customer_id, custv.profile_class_id, --site.location, -- ra_customer_trx.bill_to_site_use_id site_id, ps.customer_site_use_id site_id, -- nvl(SITE.location,'') Location , party.address1 address1, party.address2 address2, party.address3 address3, party.address4 address4, party.city city, decode(party.country, 'OM', 'Sultanate of Oman', party.country) country, ps.trx_number invoice_number, ps.trx_date doc_date, ps.customer_trx_id, ps.cust_trx_type_id, ra_customer_trx.purchase_order po_no, ra_customer_trx.purchase_order_date po_date, nvl(ps.invoice_currency_code, :functional_currency) currency_code1, nvl(ps.invoice_currency_code, :functional_currency) currency_code2, ps.amount_due_remaining inv_amt_orig, ps.amount_in_dispute disputed_amt, ps.dispute_date dispute_date, ps.due_date due_date, ( nvl(:p_statement_date, sysdate) - ps.due_date ) days_due, ps.class tran_type, nvl(ra_customer_trx.attribute15, rtt.description) y_ref, ps.acctd_amount_due_remaining func_amount FROM ar_payment_schedules_all ps, ra_customer_trx_all ra_customer_trx, ra_batch_sources_all rbsa, -- HZ_CUST_SITE_USES SITE, hz_cust_accounts cust, hz_parties party, hz_customer_profiles custv, --->> commented by Manish on 10-Mar-13 --removed on 01-apr-13 due to profile class id issue ra_cust_trx_types_all rtt WHERE ps.status = 'OP' AND cust.account_number BETWEEN nvl(:p_customer_low, cust.account_number) AND nvl(:p_customer_high, cust.account_number) AND custv.profile_class_id (+) BETWEEN nvl(:p_customer_profile_low, custv.profile_class_id(+)) AND nvl(:p_customer_profile_high, custv.profile_class_id(+)) AND ps.customer_id = cust.cust_account_id (+) AND cust.party_id = party.party_id (+) AND ps.customer_trx_id = ra_customer_trx.customer_trx_id (+) AND ra_customer_trx.cust_trx_type_id = rtt.cust_trx_type_id (+) AND ra_customer_trx.batch_source_id = rbsa.batch_source_id (+) AND ra_customer_trx.org_id = rbsa.org_id (+) --AND ra_customer_trx.bill_to_site_use_id = SITE.site_use_id(+) AND custv.site_use_id (+) = ps.customer_site_use_id--SITE.site_use_id ------>> commented by Manish on 10-Mar-13 --AND ps.CUSTOMER_SITE_USE_ID = SITE.site_use_id(+) AND rbsa.name IN ( 'Adhoc Standard Import', 'Cargo - RAPID', 'PAX - RAPID', 'SPINOFF CARGO', 'Topsystem' ) AND ps.org_id = nvl(:p_org_id, ps.org_id) AND ps.class IN ( 'CM' ) AND nvl(ra_customer_trx.complete_flag, 'N') = 'Y' AND ps.invoice_currency_code = nvl(:p_currency_code, ps.invoice_currency_code) AND ps.amount_due_remaining != 0 --Added on 10-Aug-2010 SR 17132 AND custv.cust_account_id (+) = cust.cust_account_id ---->--->> commented by Manish on 10-Mar-13 AND ps.trx_date <= nvl(:p_statement_date, ps.trx_date) AND ps.customer_site_use_id IN ( SELECT site_use_id FROM apps.hz_cust_site_uses_all WHERE site_use_id = ps.customer_site_use_id AND status = decode(:p_include_inactive_sites, 'N', 'A', status) ) ORDER BY doc_date

textSegment.string: * This is your statement of account as per our records on the above date. *
* Kindly arrange to settle the overdue invoices (if any) at the earliest. *
* Please ensure that all invoices are settled promptly on or before the *
* due dates. Thank you for your co-operation. *
Total Amount due in Functional Currency (OMR) :

function.name: beforereport
afterreport
report_nameformula
c_no_data_foundformula
afterpform
cd_inv_amt_origformula
cd_disputed_amtformula
cd_sum_inv_amt_origformula
cd_sum_dispute_amtformula
header_textformula
total_dueformula
cd_total_dueformula
cd_one_month_dueformula
cd_two_month_dueformula
cd_three_month_dueformula
cd_current_dueformula
your_refformula
footer_textformula
add1formula
country_descformula
inv_numberformula
beforepform
betweenpage
inv_amt_orig_txtformula
one_month_due_txtformula
sum_inv_amt_orig_txtformula
three_month_due_txtformula
total_due_txtformula
two_month_due_txtformula
sum_func_amount_txtformula
current_due_txtformula
cum_amount_txtformula
footer_text2formula
p_print_messagevalidtrigger
rp_company_nameformula
rp_report_nameformula
rp_data_foundformula
rp_follow_up_date_rangeformula
add3formula
add2formula

report.webSource:
<%@ taglib uri="/WEB-INF/lib/reports_tld.jar" prefix="rw" %> <%@ page language="java" import="java.io.*" errorPage="/rwerror.jsp" session="false" %> <%@ page contentType="text/html;charset=ISO-8859-1" %> <!-- <rw:report id="report"> <rw:objects id="objects"> </rw:objects> -->
<html>
<head> <meta name="GENERATOR" content="Oracle 9i Reports Developer"/> <title> Your Title </title>
<rw:style id="yourStyle"> <!-- Report Wizard inserts style link clause here --> </rw:style>
</head>
<body>
<rw:dataArea id="yourDataArea"> <!-- Report Wizard inserts the default jsp here --> </rw:dataArea>
</body> </html>
<!-- </rw:report> -->
